message:
feat(rch): optimize artifact return for test commands

Test commands (cargo test, cargo nextest run) stream their output via
stdout/stderr and don't need the full target/ directory returned. This
change adds a new default_rust_test_artifact_patterns() function that
returns minimal patterns focusing only on:

- Coverage reports (cargo-llvm-cov, tarpaulin, etc.)
- Test result files (JUnit XML, nextest archives)
- Benchmark results (Criterion)

This optimization dramatically reduces artifact transfer time for test
commands, especially on large projects where target/ can be several
gigabytes.

Changes:
- Add default_rust_test_artifact_patterns() in transfer.rs
- Update get_artifact_patterns() in hook.rs to use minimal patterns
  for CargoTest and CargoNextest compilation kinds
- Add comprehensive tests for the new patterns

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-ai1x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
